headlines.title: U.S. launches fresh wave of strikes on Iran, as analysts warn conflict risks becoming 'forever war'
headlines.summary: Fighting in the Middle East has intensified in recent days, but could escalate further if Iran fails to cooperate, President Donald Trump said.

headlines.title: Warren Buffett tells CNBC he initiated Berkshire Hathaway's investment in Alphabet
headlines.summary: Warren Buffett said he was the driving force behind the conglomerate's recent big investment in Alphabet.

headlines.title: Morgan Stanley posts record quarterly revenue and profit as equities trading surges 69%
headlines.summary: Like at peers Goldman Sachs and JPMorgan Chase, a massive beat in equities trading drove the quarter's outsized results.

headlines.title: Star analyst Dan Ives forms Yorkville Ives merchant bank after leaving Wedbush
headlines.summary: The new firm, Yorkville Ives & Co., will combine investment banking, equity research, institutional trading and principal investing.

headlines.title: Buffett says Trump's pick of Kevin Warsh for Fed chair was 'good choice'
headlines.summary: Warren Buffett believes Fed Chair Kevin Warsh will do the best job he can.

headlines.title: PayPal jumps 20% in premarket on report of Stripe, Advent $53 billion takeover offer
headlines.summary: Stripe and Advent International have reportedly made a joint offer to acquire PayPal Holdings Inc for $60.50 per share, in a deal that would value the payments company at more than $53 billion.

headlines.title: SK Hynix options begin trading. But another group of stocks is stealing its thunder
headlines.summary: One explanation for the lack of notable call-buying is that the surge in single-stock ETFs and leveraged funds stole a big chunk of the speculative limelight.

headlines.title: Oil volatility is creating a 'win-win' trade strategy
headlines.summary: The United States Oil Fund (USO), the ETF that best tracks oil prices, offers equity options traders a liquid, accessible alternative to the complexities of the futures market.

headlines.title: Traders are betting on a comeback quarter for Netflix
headlines.summary: Options traders are striking a decidedly bullish tone heading into the streaming giant's earnings on Thursday.

headlines.title: Kalshi launches 'Pro' product for users trading multiple markets at same time, perpetual futures
headlines.summary: The platform is designed to alleviate problems the company's most active traders have run into, according to a memo provided to CNBC.

headlines.title: Top Wall Street analysts are confident about these 3 stocks for the long haul
headlines.summary: Those looking for attractive stock picks amid the ongoing volatility can gain key insights by tracking the recommendations of top Wall Street analysts.

headlines.title: Berkshire Hathaway gains ground, but still trails the S&P 500 as '26 enters second half
headlines.summary: With 2026 a bit more than half over, Berkshire Hathaway's B shares are down 1.8% year-to-date and 12.4 percentage points behind the S&P 500's 10.7% gain.

headlines.title: Skip the lettuce, cook your other greens and more advice on avoiding cyclosporiasis
headlines.summary: The outbreak of cyclosporiasis, which causes diarrhea, has sickened about 6,700 people since May.

headlines.title: I’m 67 with a $140,000 pension. Should I wait until 70 to claim Social Security so my wife gets more?
headlines.summary: “When I pass, all my retirement income is reduced to $30,000 a year.”

headlines.title: SpaceX ushered in a ‘new era’ for investing in space. Why the stock is now cratering.
headlines.summary: After surging in May, the space sector has tumbled as investors are feeling an “investment coma” in the wake of the record-breaking SpaceX IPO.

headlines.title: This Wall Street ‘theme-o-meter’ has a clear message: The artificial-intelligence bull market is back
headlines.summary: UBS says its top theme right now is that leadership for artificial-intelligence stocks is returning, and earnings season may prove how investors have been too pessimistic.

headlines.title: Netflix earnings are coming. Here’s what’s needed to prop up the tumbling stock.
headlines.summary: Netflix reports quarterly earnings on Thursday. The streaming platform’s stock has dropped more than 40% over the past year.

headlines.title: BlackRock profits jump as assets under management hit a record $15 trillion
headlines.summary: Shares in the fund manager rise as company says its will boost quarterly buybacks to $550 million

candidates.thesis: Advanced Micro Devices is a leading player in AI and compute infrastructure, benefiting from secular growth in AI workloads and data center demand. The stock is trading at a reasonable RSI level and is well-positioned for long-term growth given its competitive product roadmap and market share gains in CPUs and GPUs.
candidates.entry_zone: 510-540 (near SMA50 at 485.84, but allowing for slight premium due to strong fundamentals)
candidates.risk: Stop at 450 (below SMA200 at 289.53 for long-term support)

candidates.thesis: ASML is a critical supplier in the semiconductor manufacturing supply chain, with a near-monopoly in EUV lithography technology. Its strategic importance in the semiconductor industry makes it a strong long-term play, particularly as demand for advanced chips grows.
candidates.risk: Stop at 1500 (below SMA200 at 1340.50 for strong support)

candidates.thesis: GEV is positioned to benefit from the growing adoption of small modular reactors (SMRs) and clean energy solutions. The stock is trading near its SMA50, offering a good entry point with long-term growth potential in the clean energy sector.
candidates.risk: Stop at 900 (below SMA200 at 810.54 for strong support)

candidates.thesis: Eli Lilly is a leader in the pharmaceutical industry with a strong pipeline of innovative drugs, including treatments for diabetes and Alzheimer's. Its defensive growth profile and strong fundamentals make it a compelling long-term investment.
candidates.risk: Stop at 1000 (below SMA200 at 998.50 for long-term support)

candidates.thesis: Vertex Pharmaceuticals is a leader in cystic fibrosis treatments and is diversifying its pipeline into gene editing and other high-growth areas. The stock is trading near its SMA50, offering a reasonable entry point for long-term growth.
candidates.risk: Stop at 420 (below SMA200 at 447.38 for strong support)
